signal_evidence.consumer_stress_tier: New guest cohorts are performing and behaving very similar to how that cohort has behaved in past quarters, past years — no trade-down or stress signals cited.
signal_evidence.pricing_power: AUR discussion framed as moving into a higher AUR zone with newness; no promotional or markdown pressure cited in forward guidance.
signal_evidence.management_tone_shift: Results exceeded expectations across all geographies with no guidance revision language suggesting caution; tone consistent with prior quarters of the Power of Three x2 cycle.
